# Stan Sobolev — iamjacke.com

> Staff Engineer & System Architect with 15+ years building distributed systems. Scala, Go, Kubernetes, Kafka, PostgreSQL. Mentored 20+ engineers to Staff+ level.

## About

Stan Sobolev is a Staff Engineer and System Architect specializing in distributed systems that handle millions of requests daily. He designs event-driven architectures, leads engineering teams, and mentors engineers to Staff+ level.

- Role: Staff Engineer · System Architect · Mentor
- Stack: Scala · Go · Kubernetes · Kafka · PostgreSQL
- Scale: 10M+ requests/day
- Location: Remote · Global
- Email: iamjacke@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/Jacke
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jacke1
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/stanthoughts

## Open Source Projects

### Doradura
- URL: https://github.com/jacke/doradura
- Language: Rust
- Description: Media-download ecosystem — terminal UI + Telegram bot on a shared Rust core. Downloads from 1000+ platforms (YouTube, TikTok, Spotify, SoundCloud). Audio effects, video-to-notes, 4 languages.
- Stack: Tokio, teloxide, ratatui, FFmpeg, yt-dlp, Axum, SQLite

### Telepath
- URL: https://github.com/Jacke/telepath
- Language: Python, TypeScript
- Description: Single-tenant Telegram reader and automation tool. Web dashboard for reading channels and automating messaging pipelines. JWT auth, background job scheduler.
- Stack: FastAPI, Next.js, SQLite, Docker Compose

### The Hand (Poker Engine)
- URL: https://iamjacke.com/poker/
- Language: TypeScript
- Description: Browser multiplayer poker engine. 7 variants (Hold'em, Omaha, Short Deck, Pineapple, Crazy Pineapple, Irish, Joker). P2P via WebRTC + server matchmaker. Ed25519 signed protocol. 4-tier bot AI. 300+ tests.
- Stack: Vite, PeerJS, WebSocket, @noble/ed25519, Node.js, SQLite

## Interactive Cheatsheets

All cheatsheets are interactive browser-based visualizations.

- Algorithms: Search, Dynamic Programming, Trees, B-Tree, Graph Algorithms, HashMap, LRU Cache
- Systems Design: Kafka, Raft Consensus, Consistent Hashing, Database Internals, Transaction Log, Networking, Memory Management, Retry & Backoff
- Go Internals: Channels & Goroutines, Concurrency Primitives, Interfaces, Map Internals

## Site

- URL: https://iamjacke.com
- Built with: Hugo, Tailwind CSS, custom WebGL shaders
- Deployed: GitHub Pages
